[[File:Verac the Defiled chathead.png|left]]
'''Verac the Defiled''' is the youngest of the six [[Barrows brothers]]. Verac's crypt is located to the north-west of the [[Barrows]] area. He uses [[melee]] equipment, which make him vulnerable to [[Magic]] attacks. Verac's set effect is '''Defiler''', which gives him a 25% chance per attack to ignore [[Defence]] and [[armour]] bonuses. In addition, Verac's set effect penetrates through [[protection prayers]].

Despite being able to hit through [[Protect from Melee]], it is still recommended as it negates on average 75% of his attacks and when the set effect does activate, lowers his max hit from 23 to 15. It is recommended to wear armour with good stab defence in the event Verac hits the player. He can be seen as one of the most tedious Barrows brothers to deal with since he is the only brother who cannot be alleviated solely by protection prayers, possibly requiring [[food]] too.

Verac is commonly defeated with the use of [[wind spells]], [[powered staves]], or [[Iban Blast]]. Players can also use [[Entangle]] or [[Ice spells]] on Verac to attack him from a distance.

==Trivia==
*Unlike a player using [[Verac the Defiled's equipment|his equipment]], a purple aura does not appear when his set effect activates.
*Verac the Defiled is the only melee Barrows brother who does not wear a cape, that which resembles the [[Cape of legends|Cape of Legends]].
